item.title: Juufuutei Raden’s Guide for Pixel Museum DLC ‘Hakone Travelogue’ announced
item.content:encoded:
Jupiter Corporation has announced pixel puzzle game Juufuutei Raden’s Guide for Pixel Museum downloadable content “Hakone Travelogue.” It will launch in December.

Here is an overview of the downloadable content, via Jupiter Corporation:

About

We are opening a new event exhibit, themed around Curator Raden’s beloved region of Hakone! Indulge in the charm of Hakone with this pack of Pixel Puzzles that feature its places of interest, wor ks of art, and more.

Key Features

  • 30 Hakone-themed Pixel Puzzles (including special themes available in collaboration with art museums and businesses!).
  • Three Memories of Raden Pixel Puzzles.
  • Additional background music tracks featured in the memories.
  • New commentary voiceovers for all works.

Juufuutei Raden’s Guide for Pixel Museum is available now for PlayStation 4, Xbox Series, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View a set of screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❯
